questions.q: What is the name of Jeff Bezos's secretive AI startup that was reportedly set to be valued at $38 billion after raising a mega round in April 2026?
In April 2026, Apple announced that Tim Cook will step down as CEO later in the year. Who has been confirmed to take his place?
A controversial update rolled out by Google in April 2026 grants its Gemini AI "Personal Intelligence" opt-in access to do what?
options: Scan all of your Google Photos
questions.correctText: Scan all of your Google Photos

questions.q: Why did authorities in Western Australia recently withdraw approximately 2,000 traffic fines?
options: Due to errors generated by AI road safety cameras
The speed limit signs were printed incorrectly
The traffic cameras were installed without legal permits
A hacker altered the camera system's database
questions.correctText: Due to errors generated by AI road safety cameras

questions.q: The cloud platform Vercel suffered a major security breach in April 2026 after an employee did what?
options: Granted an AI tool unrestricted access to Google Workspace
Used a weak password for the company's main database
Fell for an AI-generated deepfake phishing call
Accidentally committed an admin key to a public GitHub repo
questions.correctText: Granted an AI tool unrestricted access to Google Workspace
